 => [2/12] WORKDIR /app                                        CACHED

 => [4/12] RUN npm ci --omit=dev                                        CACHED
 => [5/12] COPY . .

 => [6/12] RUN npm run build

 => [7/12] FROM node:20-alpine AS runtime                                        CACHED
 => [8/12] WORKDIR /app                                        CACHED
 => [9/12] COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist

 => [10/12] COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules ./node_modules                                        CACHED
 => [11/12] EXPOSE 3000                                        CACHED
 => [12/12] CMD ["node", "dist/index.js"]                                        CACHED
